title: Flexologist Training Program
meta_description: Stretch practitioners complete StretchLab’s nationally accredited training program for assisted stretching. We are an approved provider of NSCA, ISSA, NASM
body_markdown:
# 
Flexologist Training Program
The Nation’s Leading Stretching Education Program
![StretchLab instructor assisting person with stretch](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/400-tall.jpg)
##  A Program as Unique as You Are
Our proprietary 50-70- hour comprehensive assisted stretching curriculum consists of a blended education, including online learning and in person instruction. This ensures that our graduates are well prepared for a career in Stretching.
Your goals your pace
The Flexologist Training Program allows you to complete your education on your schedule through it’s blend of online and in-person instruction.
Movement Analysis Training
Training includes education on movement analysis principles focused on the overhead squat (OHS). Understanding this information allows our Flexologists to deliver a best in class stretch experience.
Study Online and In-studio
The 50-70 hour training consists of in-studio instruction as well as online learning that can be accessed 24/7.
Mentorship & Support
StretchLab provided continued education and learning opportunities via our Learning Management System and experienced instructors.
![ICE Accredited Certificate Program](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/ICE-SubBrands_ICE1100-ACCREDITED-STAMP.jpg?width=568&height=816&name=ICE-SubBrands_ICE1100-ACCREDITED-STAMP.jpg)
##  The Program
StretchLab’s Flexologist Training program is the only accredited certificate program recognized by the Institute for Credentialing Excellence for assisted stretching. This proprietary Flexologist Training Program provides a challenging, yet nurturing, learning environment. It is perfect for practitioners that are looking to expand their knowledge and want to learn more about stretching, flexibility and mobility training while pursuing a career as a stretching professional. 
To learn more about the Flexologist Training Program please click the link below for our full program handbook.
[ Download the Handbook ](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/FTP-ParticipantHandbook-v7.pdf)
##  Start Your Journey – Become a Flexologist at StretchLab Today.
[ Request More Info ](https://www.stretchlab.com/flexologist-training-program)
Overall FTP program was in depth and very detailed. I feel proud and accomplished after finishing the training, and I'm excited to gain more knowledge as time goes on. I enjoyed the pre-training content, plus the 2 day workshop with my Master Flexologist was extremely beneficial for learning alternate body mechanics for each stretch. The material was helpful, informative, and set me up for success! 
This was a great two day workshop that effectively combined information covered in online training and new information. 
The training workshop was fun and filled with great new content with the related field. 
The hands on training portion was great and very detailed, it was a very educational and an interactive training program.
